description: Master registry of all knowledge base data files. Use this index to discover available files, their purpose, and schema version.

procedures.description: Post-filing compliance procedures with steps, timelines, consequences

files.description: E-verify within 30 days — Aadhaar OTP, EVC, DSC, ITR-V physical
143(1) CPC processing, 143(2) scrutiny selection, 143(3) assessment
Section 139(9) defect notices — 15-day response window
Revised return u/s 139(5) — until March 31, 2027
Belated return u/s 139(4) — until December 31, 2026; loss CF forfeited
234A/B/C interest, 234F late fee, 270A penalty, 271B audit penalty
143(1) demand, 143(2) scrutiny, 148A re-assessment notice responses
Refund via NEFT, Section 244A 6% interest, status tracking
Rectification u/s 154 — errors in AO order; within 4 years

fy202526Highlights.summary: New regime default — zero tax up to ₹12L (₹12.75L with standard deduction)
ITR-4 allows LTCG 112A within ₹1.25L exemption limit
Mandatory cash/bank balance disclosure in Schedule BP (ITR-4)
80CCD(2) employer NPS limit raised from 10% to 14%
